category_sources: Official website identifies OV as a terminal pager and lists pager features.
source_facts.description says it is a feature-rich terminal-based text viewer.
display_name_sources: Official website title is OV - Terminal Pager.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the referenced installation and settings surface.
source_facts.homepage is the official OV site and links to GitHub for installation and settings.

tags_sources: Official website lists terminal pager features including large files, follow mode, watch mode, search, highlighting, and compressed files.
source_facts.description identifies it as a terminal-based text viewer.
